description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the elixir:latest Docker image and define the stages setup, compile, test, build, publish, and deploy. In the setup stage add a get-dependencies job that runs `make deps`, stores the `deps` directory and `mix.lock` as artifacts for 30 minutes, and makes them available to downstream jobs. In the compile stage add compile-for-production and compile-for-test jobs, both depending on get-dependencies, each executing `make compile` with `MIX_ENV` set to `prod` and `test` respectively, and each publishing untracked artifacts for 30 minutes. In the test stage add a lint job that allows failure, depends on get-dependencies and compile-for-test, runs `make lint` with `MIX_ENV=test`, and a tests job that also depends on get-dependencies and compile-for-test, runs `export $(cat .env | xargs)` then `make test`, uses an `elasticsearch:5` service, sets `MIX_ENV=test`, and captures coverage using the regex `/\[TOTAL\]\s+(\d+\.\d+)%/`. Apply a global `before_script` of `make init` to all jobs.
